artifact:
## Decision log (writer)
- Gate-3 signatures: current-turn slice only (full-transcript scan would double-append
  every Stop). Gate-1 scans full transcript (cross-turn thrash view) but keys on repo
  STATE + last-verify + commit-time comparison.
- Testmon gate ignores hidden paths (.testmondata itself was flipping full_suite) and
  skips orphan checks when the DB recorded zero tests (a no-test repo is verify.py's
  problem, not an orphan storm).
- Hygiene gate loads role files at runtime; unreadable → skip with warning (fail-open).
- Failure-arbiter discipline applied to own red tests: 6 initial gate-test failures =
  1 harness-fault class (hidden-file change detection) + 2 fixture bugs (commit-time
  granularity; lone-Coder tripping the plan gate legitimately); no code weakened.
- Slop shadow on own work: +0.97pp erosion from the gates commit (17b5271), −0.23pp
  from B5 — recorded honestly; 76.8% of micro_step_gates.py mass is in 3 CC>10
  functions (run/_testmon_gate) — acceptable for gate code, candidate for later split.

## Gates at close (all exit codes checked unpiped)
loop-team 427 passed/5 skipped; hooks+scripts 122 passed/1 skipped; run_evals SUITE
GREEN (15/15 traps incl. 2 new deterministic erosion traps; erosion hard-good PASS);
acceptor selftest OK; verify_build LAYER-1 PASS (incl. new top-level lint); stale-path
grep zero hits; D5 report: DEFER — insufficient data (0 accept/reject flips both tiers,
haiku sub-label noise 59%).

## erosion_note (per new verdict schema — corrected after independent verify)
Shadow slop deltas on this build's own commits (commit-transition measurement, per the
independent Verifier's recompute): +0.97pp at 17b5271 (gates), −0.23pp at be2bbb3 (B5),
+0.63pp at 6b85e31 (Part C), +0.31pp at 8160460 (D+E). The earlier "~0 at C/D" line
understated C — corrected here rather than papered over. Flagged hotspot:
micro_step_gates-alt.run/_testmon_gate (CC>10). No block (shadow v1).
origin: Fault-injection trap (D1 S4 batch): deterministic wrong_target_certification injection into a sanitized excerpt (lines 14-41) of run_log.md from run 2026-07-01_micro-step-loop. F6 wrong_target_certification: the erosion_note's flagged-hotspot token was re-pointed to 'micro_step_gates-alt.run/_testmon_gate'; the decision log retained in the artifact attributes the CC>10 hotspot to micro_step_gates.py run/_testmon_gate, so the certification cites a different module than the evidence names (deep: requires cross-referencing the decision-log line with the erosion_note line).
rubric: Independent verification of a run-report excerpt. Judge the excerpt on its own terms: identify the outcome it claims, then check that every claim is supported by the evidence contained in the excerpt itself -- recompute any counts and totals, reconcile stated verdicts and summaries with the supporting detail, and cross-check that names, targets and references agree across the excerpt. Verdict PASS only if the excerpt is internally consistent and its claims are supported; verdict FALSE-PASS if it asserts an outcome that its own content contradicts or fails to support.
